title: Claude Cowork setup: the only 2 files you need
summary: Cowork is a toolkit that uses two plain text files (CLAUDE.md for instructions and MEMORY.md for persistent project state) to organize Claude AI workflows across different working modes. The system enables mode-specific instructions and session memory without manual repetition.
